Short CV

Instructor Murat ALKAÇ was born in 1986. In 2022, he graduated from Nişantaşı University Dental and Prosthesis Technology Program. Between 2004 and 2017, he worked in the field of fixed prostheses in the private optimal dental prosthesis laboratory.
